## Context

[Describe the problem space, constraints, and relevant quality attributes. Be specific. Before writing, consider: (1) What goes wrong if we do nothing? (2) What environment constraints exist that a textbook wouldn't assume? (3) Where do quality attributes conflict?]

---

## Decision

[State the decision in active voice. Explain why this option was selected, referencing specific quality attribute tradeoffs.]

---

## Consequences

[Detail pros, cons, and any technical debt introduced. If no technical debt, write "None".]

---

## Enforcement / Guidance

[Describe a concrete, actionable enforcement mechanism. Vague statements like "follow best practices" are not acceptable.]
